news.t: Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
Love the SCHD ETF? SCHK, SCHB, SCHX, and HYT are good too

holdings.infoBox: SCHK is an equity ETF with a total of 990 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.20%, Apple at 6.17%, Microsoft at 4.19%, Amazon.com at 3.36%, and Alphabet at 3.05%.

overview.description: The Schwab 1000 Index ETF (SCHK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Schwab 1000 index, a proprietary market-cap-weighted index that includes 1,000 of the largest US-listed stocks. SCHK was launched on Oct 11, 2017 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

data.title: Schwab Asset Management Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced forward share splits on 20 Schwab ETFs. Forward ETF share splits...

data.title: Love the SCHD ETF? SCHK, SCHB, SCHX, and HYT are good too
data.text: The Schwab US Dividend Equity (SCHD) ETF has had robust inflows this year as it moved to its all-time high. Its total returns this year stood at almost 10%, meaning that it has lagged the performance ...
